subTitle.v: Xử lý đơn hàng treo: duyệt, hủy, bỏ duyệt...

query.text: exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Loading @@id, @@master, @@prime, @@partition, @@expression, @@extension, @@pageCount, 'stt_rec', @@textList, @@textExternal, 'a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh', @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, 1, 0, '', 'status = ''3''', '', '', '', 1

declare @PrimeJoin varchar(4000), @PrimeFilter nvarchar(4000), @Alias varchar(32), @DetailPartition varchar(4000), @DetailAlias varchar(32), @DetailFilter nvarchar(4000), @aggregation nvarchar(4000) if @status = '1' select @status = '2', @PrimeJoin = ' left join ' + @@prime + '%Partition b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec', @PrimeFilter = 'b.u_status <> ''2''', @DetailPartition = 'd64$%Partition', @DetailAlias = 'c', @DetailFilter = '1 = 1 group by c.stt_rec having sum(sl_hd) + sum(sl_dh) = 0', @Alias = 'a.', @aggregation = 'Sum(b.t_tien_nt2)' else select @status = '3', @PrimeJoin = '', @PrimeFilter = '', @DetailPartition = '', @DetailAlias = '', @DetailFilter = '', @Alias = '', @aggregation = 'Sum(t_tien_nt2)'
if @Alias = '' select @Alias = @$primeAlias if @$primeJoin <> '' select @PrimeJoin = @PrimeJoin + ' ' + @$primeJoin if @$primeFilter <> '' select @PrimeFilter = @PrimeFilter + case when @PrimeFilter <> '' then ' and ' else '' end + @$primeFilter
exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @@id, @@master, @@prime, @@inquiry, @@partition, @@expression, @@increase, @@extension, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @@keyMaster, @@keyDetail, 'stt_rec', @@textList, @@textExternal, 'a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh', @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, @so_ct1, @so_ct2, @status, 0, @ma_dvcs, default, default, default, default, default, default, @Alias, @PrimeJoin, @PrimeFilter, @DetailPartition, @DetailAlias, @DetailFilter, @$aggregationAlias, 't_tien_nt2', 't_tien_nt2', @aggregation, 'sum(t_tien_nt2)'

action.text: declare @l int, @size int, @i int, @id char(13) select @size = col_length('wrkgl', 'stt_rec') select @i = 1, @l = datalength(text)/2 from @s while @i + @size <= @l + 1 begin select @id = replace(substring(text, @i, @size), '''', ''), @i = @i + @size + 1 from @s exec rs_PostSOAuthorize 1, @id, @@userID end select 1 as value return

declare @l int, @size int, @i int, @id char(13) select @size = col_length('wrkgl', 'stt_rec') select @i = 1, @l = datalength(text)/2 from @s while @i + @size <= @l + 1 begin select @id = replace(substring(text, @i, @size), '''', ''), @i = @i + @size + 1 from @s exec rs_PostSOAuthorize 2, @id, @@userID end select 2 as value return

declare @l int, @size int, @i int, @id char(13) select @size = col_length('wrkgl', 'stt_rec') select @i = 1, @l = datalength(text)/2 from @s while @i + @size <= @l + 1 begin select @id = replace(substring(text, @i, @size), '''', ''), @i = @i + @size + 1 from @s exec rs_UnPostSOAuthorize @id, @@userID end select 3 as value return
